nasb.text: Moreover, you shall not take ransom for the life of a murderer who is guilty of death, but he shall surely be put to death.

esv.text: Moreover, you shall accept no ransom for the life of a murderer, who is guilty of death, but he shall be put to death.

cnv.text: 犯了死罪，故意殺人的，你們不可收取贖價代他贖命，因為他必被處死。

ccb.text: 犯了死罪的杀人凶手必须偿命，不可让他付赎金免死。
